instruction: In the Reminders app, mark the reminder titled "Pick up laundry" as completed.
reference_command:
reminder_id=$(remindctl all --json | jq -r '.[] | select(.title == "Pick up laundry") | .id' | head -n 1)
if [ -z "$reminder_id" ]; then
  echo "Reminder not found: Pick up laundry"
  exit 1
fi
remindctl complete "$reminder_id"
